name: Paylocity Holding Corporation
description: Paylocity Holding Corporation is a leading American provider of cloud-based human capital management (HCM), payroll, and spend management software solutions. Headquartered in the United States, the company offers an innovative, unified platform that integrates HR, payroll, finance, and IT functions to help organizations streamline their workforce management processes. By providing tools for expense management, corporate cards, and automated procurement, Paylocity enables businesses to move away from fragmented systems, fostering greater efficiency and collaboration across their operations while supporting the evolving needs of modern workforces.
